innateAbility.name: Fortune Favors the Bold
innateAbility.description: Most items and ability effects, both defensive and offensive, that utilizes pseudo-random distribution has a reduced chance to occur when interacting with Pangolier.

abilities.name: Swashbuckle
abilities.description: Dashes along to the point-targeted location, then slashes all enemy units in the vector-targeted direction.

abilities.name: Shield Crash
abilities.description: Jumps in the air and slams back to the ground in front of his current position, damaging and applying a movement speed slow within the radius.

abilities.name: Lucky Shot
abilities.description: Donté's attacks and spell damage applied have a chance to additionally apply a movement speed slow while reducing the affected enemy units' armor.

abilities.name: Roll Up
abilities.description: Curls into Donté's Gyroshell form.Grants debuff immunity and the ability to turn.

abilities.name: Rolling Thunder
abilities.description: Curls into a ball and rolls out. Donté has increased magic resistance and is debuff immune.While rolling, he moves at an increased speed and can move through trees.Applies a knockback, stuns enemy units within the collision radius, and deals bonus spell damage based on his current total attack damage.
